goal: Get the clinic's address and rough directions or parking info.
success_criteria: The agent provides a location/address or a clear way to get it.

lines.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes
Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics part of Pretty Good AI Am I speaking with Maria
Oh no this is Robert Ellis I'm just calling to get some directions actually
Thanks for letting me know Robert Pivot Point Orthopedics is located at 1234 Recovery Way Suite 200 Austin Is there anything else you need
Okay thanks Could you give me an idea of how to get there maybe from downtown

I can't provide detailed directions but the clinic is at 1234 Recovery Way Suite 200 It's in the Recovery Plaza Medical Building with free parking in front If you need more help a MAP app can guide you from downtown
Got it Recovery Plaza with free parking in front That helps I'll get there
